projects.name: Woods Interior
projects.label: Semester 6
projects.description: A functional complex interlinking manufacturing, assembly, painting, storage, display and administrative units through a central semi-open courtyard — bridging interior and exterior realms while guiding visitors seamlessly toward the showroom.

projects.name: Reassessing Master Architect
projects.label: Semester 3
projects.description: Inspired by Gehry's approach to irregular geometry, the boundary lines of the site become the form-generator. Three trapezoidal blocks rotated southward to maximise solar gain — creating a home that fosters familial connection across generations.

projects.name: Shree Shiladevi Primary School
projects.label: Semester 4
projects.description: A curvilinear form that embodies the playful nature of children — voids puncture the building mass for airflow and diffused light, while internal play spaces blur the boundary between indoors and outdoors.

projects.name: Bhraka Village Resort
projects.label: Ongoing
projects.description: A checkpoint resort for trekkers en route to Ice Lake and Tilicho Lake. Interior renovation drawing from Manang's elemental vocabulary — mud plaster, rough stone, wooden log cross-sections, traditional rugs — evoking the warmth of high-altitude shelter.

projects.name: Khatry Residence
projects.label: Under Construction
projects.description: A luxurious family home bridging cultural aesthetics and contemporary sensibility. Involved municipal drawing documentation, bathroom design with warm-toned materials, and multiple site supervision visits observing foundation and structural work.

projects.name: Sam's One Tree Café
projects.label: Conceptual
projects.description: Extension of the Durbarmarg flagship into a colonial-era building. Tiki jhya lattice partitions, terracotta flooring, and a dark teak bar ceiling weave Nepali character into a contemporary café experience.

projects.name: Shikhar Insurance
projects.label: Completed
projects.description: A complete layout overhaul reorganising circulation and introducing exposed grid false ceilings — with a brand-anchored reception table drawing from the company's orange-and-black identity.

projects.name: World Bank Office
projects.label: Ongoing
projects.description: Country Management Unit renovation — condensing three workstations into two with a comfortable corner lounge, and Kathmandu skyline glass murals referencing the World Bank's visual language.
